name: Snapdocs Digital Mortgage Closing Platform API
what_it_does: Snapdocs digital mortgage closing REST API for lenders, title companies, and settlement agents to orchestrate hybrid and full eClosing workflows, notary scheduling, document management, and closing status tracking — enabling programmatic closing order creation, notary marketplace coordination, eSign document delivery, and post-closing automation through Snapdocs' closing platform used by 130,000+ lending professionals. Enables AI agents to manage closing order creation for mortgage closing workflow automation, handle notary scheduling for signing appointment automation, access document delivery for eSign package automation, retrieve closing status for milestone tracking automation, manage wet vs eSign for hybrid closing automation, handle RON for remote online notarization automation, access closing disclosure for document review automation, retrieve fee reconciliation for post-closing automation, manage MISMO for mortgage data interchange automation, and integrate Snapdocs with LOS, title software, and notary networks for end-to-end digital mortgage closing automation.
use_cases: Creating digital mortgage closing orders and coordinating notary scheduling for lender automation agents
Orchestrating hybrid eClosing workflows with eSign and wet-sign documents for title company agents
Tracking mortgage closing milestones and document status for loan officer notification automation agents
Integrating Snapdocs with LOS (Encompass, Byte) for automated closing order triggers and status sync agents
not_for: Commercial real estate closings (Snapdocs is residential mortgage-focused)
Consumer direct property purchase without lender involvement (Snapdocs is lender/title-centric)
General document management outside mortgage context (Snapdocs is specialized for mortgage closing)
best_when: A mortgage lender, title company, or settlement agent wanting AI agents to orchestrate digital closing workflows, schedule notaries, manage eSign packages, and track closing milestones through Snapdocs' mortgage closing platform.
avoid_when: LENDER OR TITLE COMPANY ACCOUNT REQUIRED: Snapdocs serves lenders and title companies, not end consumers; automated direct consumer access assumption creates wrong account type; automated must have Snapdocs lender or title company account. RON JURISDICTION REQUIREMENTS: Remote Online Notarization (RON) is only available in states with RON enabling legislation; automated national RON availability assumption creates jurisdiction_not_supported; automated must check RON eligibility by state before scheduling RON notary appointments. DOCUMENT FORMAT REQUIREMENTS: Snapdocs requires PDF/A compliant documents with specific formatting; automated arbitrary document format assumption creates document_validation_error; automated must pre-validate documents against Snapdocs PDF requirements. NOTARY AVAILABILITY IS MARKETPLACE-BASED: Snapdocs notary scheduling uses a marketplace of available notaries; automated guaranteed immediate notary availability assumption creates notary_not_available; automated must account for scheduling lead time and notary marketplace availability.

auth.notes: Snapdocs uses API key authentication. REST API with JSON. San Francisco, CA HQ. Founded 2012 by Aaron King. Products: eClosing, hybrid closing, RON, notary marketplace, document delivery, LOS integrations. SDKs: None public. 130,000+ lending professionals. Raised $150M (Series D 2022). SOC 2 Type II, MISMO certified. Integrates with Encompass, BytePro, Calyx, and major LOS platforms. Competes with Qualia and Stavvy for digital closing.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Sandbox for approved integration partners; production requires Snapdocs agreement
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-closing transaction pricing; enterprise volume pricing; LOS integration fees
pricing.notes: San Francisco CA. SOC 2, MISMO. Per-closing transaction fees. LOS integrations. Mortgage closing focus.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; closing order and document APIs throttled

known_agent_gotchas: RON IS JURISDICTION-SPECIFIC: Remote Online Notarization is only available in RON-enabled states; automated national RON deployment creates jurisdiction_not_supported; automated must check state-level RON legislation status and fall back to hybrid or in-person for non-RON states

LENDER/TITLE ACCOUNT TYPE REQUIRED: Snapdocs serves lenders and title companies; automated consumer/individual access assumption creates wrong_account_type error; automated must use Snapdocs through institutional lender or title company account

DOCUMENT PDF/A COMPLIANCE: Snapdocs requires PDF/A formatted documents for eSign workflows; automated arbitrary PDF submission creates document_validation_error; automated must convert or validate documents to PDF/A before submitting closing packages

NOTARY SCHEDULING LEAD TIME: Snapdocs notary marketplace requires scheduling lead time; automated same-day notary availability assumption creates notary_not_available; automated must schedule notary appointments with appropriate advance notice (typically 24-48 hours)

WEBHOOK CLOSING EVENTS ARE CRITICAL: Snapdocs webhooks fire on closing milestones (scheduled, completed, documents delivered); automated polling-only assumption creates delayed closing status; automated should implement webhook handlers for real-time LOS status updates
agent_readiness.security_notes: Mortgage closing platform. SOC 2, MISMO, CFPB, TRID, GLBA. API key. US. Highly sensitive mortgage and identity data. Notary credentials.

security_score_components.security_notes: Mortgage eClosing. SOC 2, MISMO, TRID, GLBA. API key. US. Mortgage, identity, and notary credential data.
